title: Toad's Tools
description: My first resource pack! This pack will add a little touch to your tools and modify the colors to make them look a tiny bit better! Hope you guys like it!
body:
# Welcome to my first resource pack!

I plan on putting a lot of work into this project, with up-to-date version tests and much more. This pack doesnt change much, but it makes a **big** difference for enchanted tools.

Enjoy!

_Supported versions (TESTED): All versions from 1.20.1 to 1.21.10_
